events.label: 2000 Dot-com Bust
events.description: Tech-heavy equities sold off sharply after the internet bubble burst, then recovered gradually over the following years.

events.label: 2008 Financial Crisis
events.description: A deep global financial crisis led to a severe equity drawdown followed by a multi-stage recovery.

events.label: 2020 COVID Crash
events.description: Pandemic shock triggered one of the fastest crashes in modern history, followed by a sharp rebound.

events.label: 2022 Rate Hike Bear Market
events.description: Higher inflation and aggressive rate hikes pressured risk assets before markets stabilized.
